author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate path containment helpers across package and extension code

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: path containment logic is repeated across package and extension boundaries. src/core/packages/manifest.ts:225 defines isPathWithinDirectory; src/cli/commands/extension.ts:541 and src/core/extensions/loader.ts:1160 define the same containment plus canonical realpath wrapper logic. Existing searches found closed sandbox work and open contract-list items, but no active item for filesystem boundary helper duplication.

A shared path containment/canonical containment helper is used by package manifest validation, extension install/doctor, and extension loader paths; path traversal/security semantics remain unchanged; focused package/extension tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'path containment isPathWithinDirectory canonical path extension package loader manifest' found pm-w98k for extension contract lists, not filesystem boundary validation; no active exact helper-dedup item found.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for path containment helpers
